evidence_summary: The scene focuses on the tactical execution of a combined land campaign. Production must manage the logistics of unloading Thark mounts and coordinating the movement of heterogeneous forces (Thark Warriors and Heliumite Soldiers) to execute a decisive assau...

Carter stays with Tars Tarkas to lead the land campaign. After unloading Thark mounts, the combined Thark and Heliumite forces launch a decisive assault on the remaining Zodangan land camps, crushing the resistance despite being outnumbered.
